title: Bedrock port
description: The awesome features of Bedrock edition without its nonsense
body:
# Bedrock port

I started playing Minecraft on Bedrock edition and I do miss all the awesome features it has. I'm collecting many projects in this modpack to port to Java all those awesome features but use an engine that actually works.

## Features
- Armor stands have poses and can hold tools
- BE boat recipes
- Bone meal parity
- Better wither animations
- Forward bridging
- Water changes color depending on the biome
- Cauldrons can hold colored water and potions. Leather armour can be dyed in cauldrons.
- Colored sheared sheep will have colored scraps on
- Swapping between items in the hotbar shows their detailed info
- Dirt path can be obtained with silk touch
- White tree leaves in snowy biomes

Bedrock still has many more features. Here's a [list](https://mcknowledgebook.vercel.app/editionsdiffs) of in game feature differences between Java and Bedrock.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yuAwDETk/images/38f02bc56436809eafc580e151d5dc77def6118b.png)

## Info

| Tech | Info | Version |
| ---- | ---- | ------- |
| | Minecraft | `1.20.1` |
| Loader | `fabric` | |
